metadata.theme_strategy: The Editor's Desk (Swiss Editorial + Luxury Jewel)

usage_rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight font-medium leading-[0.9]
usage_rules.caption: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground/70

colors.strategy: Dual Mode - Editorial Print (Light) & VIP Lounge (Dark)

landing_page.cell_style: border border-border/40 p-8 md:p-12 min-h-[300px] flex flex-col justify-between hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors duration-500
landing_page.hero_span: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 lg:col-span-9 row-span-2 bg-foreground text-background
landing_page.cta_span: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-3 row-span-1 flex items-center justify-center bg-accent text-accent-foreground

dashboard.specs: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 p-4 md:p-8 max-w-[1920px] mx-auto
dashboard.card_style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-none hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

buttons.default: rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm font-mono tracking-widest uppercase transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-foreground hover:text-background border border-foreground/10

cards.base: rounded-none border border-border bg-card p-0 overflow-hidden group relative

inputs.base: rounded-none border-0 border-b border-input bg-transparent px-0 py-4 text-lg focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-primary transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 font-serif italic

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 border-b border-border/40 backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60
navigation.link: text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-widest hover:text-primary transition-colors relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-[-4px] after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[1px] after:bg-primary after:transition-all hover:after:w-full

noise_overlay.css: fixed inset-0 z-[9999] pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
DO NOT use rounded corners (> 4px). Keep it sharp and editorial.
Typography is the UI. Use font size and weight for hierarchy, not colorful badges.
Always use the 'Playfair Display' font for headings Level 1 and 2.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any data, scores, or code snippets.
Inputs should look like lines on a paper form (border-bottom only), not boxes.
Buttons should feel like physical switches or stamps - precise, rectangular.
All animations must be 'ease-out-expo' (fast start, slow smooth finish).
DarkMode is not just inverted colors; it is a 'VIP Lounge' (dim, spotlight effects).
Data-testid attributes are MANDATORY for all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install 'lucide-react', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' if missing. 2. Update 'index.css' with the CSS variables provided in 'design_system.colors'. 3. Import the Google Fonts in 'index.css' or 'App.css'. 4. Create a 'Layout' component that applies the noise overlay globally. 5. Follow the 'layout_strategies' for the Landing Page and Dashboard. 6. Override Shadcn components in 'components/ui' to match the 'radius: 0rem' and border styles.
